description: CompositionBlack hooded jacket made of 100% polyester with a mesh panel inside, has a mock neck with a full front zipper closure, raglan sleeves with patented adidas 3-Stripes in blue, hood with doggle straps, zippered pockets on the sides of the waist, doggle straps at the hem, heat transferred branding on the right chest and collection name on the back chest, and has thread detailingFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your healthy runs in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants, sports shoes and cap for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
